fallacies.name: KPI-as-target
fallacies.text: Tuning a model/parameters to chase a KPI. A KPI must be a fixed ruler, not something you optimize toward.

fallacies.name: multiple-testing
fallacies.text: Trying many timeframes/parameter sets then cheering the best one. Pre-register and log every run.

fallacies.name: redundant-confirmation
fallacies.text: Assuming 'A must confirm B' without checking incremental info. If B alone gives the same edge, the confirmation is an illusion.

fallacies.name: garbage-in-garbage-out
fallacies.text: Backtesting before proving the thesis (skipping Gate 0). Pretty KPIs from overfit fool you.

fallacies.name: look-ahead-bias
fallacies.text: Using information not available at decision time (future data, full-sample fitting). Always trade out-of-sample.
